title: The Dark Pressure
description: Everything is normal at the day but when the dark begins to raise they started searching for your blood and kills you . Stay away from dark . I also recommend you to always keep a torch in your hand
body:
# The Dark Pressure Beta 0.3-He Is Not The One You'r Asking     

###  **This Mod Is a Beta Version So Not Everything Is Here . You Feadback Is Very Important for us to develope this mod**  


Eveything is normal at the day but when the dark begins to raise they started searching for your blood and kills you . Stay away from dark . Avoid Staying In caves . always keep a torch in your hand . I also recommend you to maintain silence when they near or watching you . You can sleep but dont sleep too much . they can teleport you to their diamenssion so be careful with them . If you hear a Siren Sound dont stay their for too long .

They Will Give You a first warning , If you didnt Care About It You will not alive in the second warning 

# **Dont Forgot to add geckolib and Dynamic lights because this mod didnt work without it.**

## WARNING :

- This Mod Is Not Compatible With Any Other Horror Mods
- Don't Use This Mod In You'r Main World
